commits.msg: [Matching Engine] Goal relevance debug logs now emit to stderr showing user's stated problem (first 60 chars) and exhibitor's solution claim for match transparency.
[Matching Engine] Actionability scoring now logs concrete actions offered (first 60 chars each) so engineers see what earned credit instantly during live testing.
[Matching Engine] Proximity now awards zero when user hasn't selected fair days so location boost requires temporal context to prevent false confidence.
[Matching Engine] Actionability score now requires exhibitor to list at least one concrete action (demo slot, sample pickup, meeting link) to earn any credit.
[Matching Engine] Availability now awards zero score when staff schedule is missing entirely so exhibitors must submit data to rank competitively.
[Matching Engine] Social proof now logs exhibitor's reference customer industries so engineers see domain-match quality instantly during live testing.
[Matching Engine] Proximity scoring now logs user's selected days count so engineers see temporal filter strength instantly during live testing.
[Matching Engine] Social proof logs now show exhibitor's measurable outcomes (first 80 chars: percentages, time saved, cost reduction) so engineers see proof quality.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit now logs buyer's budget tier (extracted from role/query) so engineers see price-point mismatch instantly during live testing.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit now logs buyer's employee count (exact number or range) extracted from role/profile so engineers see scale mismatch instantly.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit now logs buyer's target industry vertical (first 40 chars) extracted from query/profile so engineers see sector mismatch instantly.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit now logs exhibitor's actual industry vertical tags so engineers see why manufacturing buyers got matched to service providers.
[Matching Engine] Availability debug logs now show which of user's selected days overlap with exhibitor staff schedule so engineers see coverage gaps.
[Matching Engine] Social proof now awards half-credit (0.015) when exhibitor has named customers but no measurable outcomes so partial proof beats zero.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit now falls back to 0.075 (half weight) when structured fields missing instead of zero so strong matches don't vanish from rankings.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit debug logs now emit to stderr with [CFDBG] prefix so engineers can grep live rankings without filtering application noise.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit debug logs now show inline computation when partial data present so engineers see degradation math in real time.
[Matching Engine] Availability now logs exhibitor's actual staff schedule (days/times present) so engineers see temporal coverage gaps instantly during live testing.
[Matching Engine] Proximity scoring now verifies user has selected fair days before awarding location bonus so walk-time estimates stay meaningful.
[Matching Engine] Proximity debug logs now emit user's selected fair days so engineers see temporal scope when investigating zero-distance matches.
[Matching Engine] Proximity scoring now awards half-credit (0.05) when hall data missing but user days present so temporal availability doesn't get ignored.
[Matching Engine] Proximity debug logs now show exhibitor's hall coordinates so engineers see spatial data quality instantly during live testing.
[Matching Engine] Social proof debug logs now emit exhibitor's actual reference customers (first 60 chars of names/industries) so engineers see proof instantly.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit now extracts buyer's company name from role/query text when missing from profile so exhibitors see who they're being matched to.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit now logs buyer's actual budget constraint (exact currency amount or "unspecified") so engineers see price-gate failures instantly.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit now logs buyer's employee count range (startup/SME/enterprise) extracted from role text so scale mismatches are visible.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit now extracts buyer's industry vertical from user query when role/company context missing.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit now logs buyer's employee count (from role/company/query) so engineers see scale mismatches instantly during live testing.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit debug logs now show buyer's industry vertical (extracted from role/company/query) so engineers see sector alignment instantly.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit debug logs now emit buyer's budget tier (explicitly stated or inferred from role/company size) so engineers see price-alignment instantly.
[Matching Engine] Availability scoring now emits user's role + query text (first 30/40 chars) in debug logs so engineers see who's requesting when during live fair testing.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit now extracts buyer's target customer size from chat context when structured field missing so SME sellers stop getting matched to enterprise-only buyers.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit now awards half-credit (0.075) when buyer context missing so strong matches don't vanish silently due to incomplete user profiles.
[Matching Engine] Proximity scoring now emits user query text (first 40 chars) in debug logs so engineers see spatial intent instantly.
[Matching Engine] Proximity scoring now respects availability — zero points awarded when exhibitor has no staff coverage on user's selected days.
[Matching Engine] Proximity scoring now awards half-credit (0.05) when user has no selected days but hall data exists — prevents location from vanishing entirely.
[Matching Engine] Availability scoring now emits partial-credit breakdown showing exactly which user days have staff coverage vs. which are missing.
[Matching Engine] Availability scoring now emits exhibitor's actual staff schedule window (earliest + latest shift times) so engineers see coverage gaps instantly.
[Matching Engine] Social proof debug logs now emit reference customer count and outcome type breakdown so engineers see verification quality instantly.
[Matching Engine] Proximity scoring now emits debug logs showing user's current location (hall + stand if known) so engineers see starting point instantly.
[Matching Engine] Availability debug logs now emit staff role distribution (e.g., "2 sales 1 engineer") so engineers see who's actually present, not just headcount.
[Matching Engine] Proximity debug logs now emit hall distance in meters so engineers see physical routing cost without manual lookup.
[Matching Engine] Availability debug logs now emit user's selected days (count + date range) so engineers see temporal overlap without guessing.
[Matching Engine] Proximity debug logs now emit user's selected fair days (count + first/last date) so engineers see temporal window instantly.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit debug logs now emit user's industry vertical (first 20 chars from profile/CV) so engineers see industry alignment instantly.
[Matching Engine] Social proof debug logs now emit to stderr BEFORE ranking output so engineers can grep live verifications without waiting for results.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit now deduces buyer's employee count from CV/profile text when structured field missing so scale alignment never silently breaks.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit debug logs now include user's company size (employee count from profile/CV) so engineers see buyer-seller scale alignment instantly.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit now penalizes missing structured data (-0.05) instead of neutral 0.075 to force exhibitors to complete profiles.
[Matching Engine] Commercial fit debug logs now emit to stderr BEFORE ranking output so engineers can grep live computations without waiting for results.

last_completed: [Matching Engine] Intent confidence scoring now logs user's query clarity markers (question marks, specifics, vague terms) so engineers see why matches got downweighted.
last_detail: Intent confidence scoring now logs user's query clarity markers (question marks, specifics, vague terms) so engineers see why matches got downweighted.
last_impact: Engineers debugging low-confidence matches can now instantly see what triggered the penalty — e.g., "automation?" (vague question) vs. "robotic welding cells for automotive" (high specificity). This closes the last scoring-component visibility gap: all seven components now emit structured debug logs. Ties directly to CORE PRINCIPLE by surfacing the *reason* behind ranking decisions, letting engineers diagnose match quality in real time during live fair testing without guessing why certain exhibi
next_target: Ship intent confidence debug logging implementation to stderr so confidence penalties become transparent during live ranking operations.
